DBGT.com Version 2.0

  Info on what is coming from within
2003'4'23 ++ posted by Valix
I just became a staff member it seems pretty fun at most. Free stuff (buttons, avatars, backgrounds, and banners) are coming soon ^_^!. Well that's all for now I'am out.

3 New Free Buttons!
2003'4'23 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, I just added 3 New Free Buttons in our Miscellaneous section. 1 was designed by Sinister, and I thought I would join in, so I designed 2 more. Once again, these buttons are available for you all to use as your site's button, although you cannot use these buttons as free stuff on your site, without my permission. Anyways, check out those new buttons for now. Sinister may have 1 or 2 new Free Layouts for you all sometime soon.

On another note, I'll be getting some Multimedia Episodes back up, hopefully this Thursday, if I don't get too much homework from school. We may also be getting another staff member or two to help us get you guys more free stuff, and get the Gaming Section going again / Anyways, thats it for now / MG Out...

*Free Buttons

Back In Style
2003'4'21 ++ posted by Legendary Amir
Wow, thats all I could've said when I saw this new layout. JamJar has really outdone himself this time ;p Nice job bro.
In the past couple of days, actually weeks, I have been getting a load of posotive feedback from my C++ tutorial and my graphic tuts. Well, I am glad that people are using them and are enjoying them, so to keep you fans on the line, I am in the making of dishing out one or two more C++ tutorials and a couple graphic tutorials, more likely in Photoshop since thats where I have been getting the most requests. Sorry to those of you who have been waiting for new tutorials, they will be coming soon. And one more thing. I have also been getting many emails and messeges on AIM asking me stuff like "Can you please code my layout for me?" or "Can you make a quick website with a banner please?", and to top it off, "Can you host me? I need a good host for my media." People, I am not here to customize anything personally for you. If you need help, thats another thing, but I can't make it for you, you have to give me something to work with. Coding a site is demandy nowadays so I don't do that no more, sorry. And I don't own any part of this site so giving space out would be out of my hands. I hope this clears stuff for everyone.

Back With DBGT.com
2003'4'21 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone! I hope you're enjoying DBGT as of now. Phew, MG and JamJar got a lot of work done in order to get it back online. Well, yeah..I know you haven't heard from me in ages, but I've been real busy. I've been helping friends out in the community, and have been working on some projects of my own and getting good at coding ^_^. So, as of today, I am getting back to work on DBGT. I'll be starting some of my own projects for DBGT, including additions to Miscellaneous, Information, and overall the whole site. Be sure to watch out for some of those. Anyways, I really hope you're enjoying the site. Remember, a lot of work was put into it and I think that it's awesome. Aite, I guess I'll catch you guys on the flip side - Draton, signing out..

The New DBGT.COM
2003'4'19 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, welcome to the new Dragon Ball GT Website! Hopefully you all love the new layout, I know I'm in love with it, and we have JamJar of PGD to thank for it. Maybe the layout looks familiar? Yep, its similar to our Image Gallery's layout! So you may have noticed it ahead of time if you followed the clues. As you can see, the splash said we would be returning Sunday, but today is Saturday. We worked hard day and night to bring you DBGT back faster than expected. A huge part of this work goes out to JamJar, he helped me with nearly every aspect of putting up this layout and fitting in the content. I also thank the rest of the staff for waiting patiently.

Over the next few days, we may be changing tiny things here and there on the layout to give it that final complete feeling of home. This layout is alot less graphicy, and I like it that way. I wanted to go for the more spacious and professional look which we now have.

Anyways, DBGT is still relatively the same, with all the content. The major difference is that I've split the Information section in 4 categories. Dragon Ball, Dragon Ball Z, Dragon Ball GT, and Conjunction Information. Conjunction Information, is content that fits into all 3 series of Dragon Ball.

We also added a couple new things for the opening. JamJar put together a very extensive HTML Tester, making it easier to use and even more helpful. We also added a FAQ page, so please go and read it before you ask the staff a question, since it may have already been answered. We also added a Link Us page, which includes our old button and a set of new buttons and banners created by JamJar for you all to use if you wish to link us.

A note to the staff: Please do not post over this before I give the go ahead.Well, thats it for now / Explore & Enjoy The New DBGT.COM / MG Out...

*HTML Tester
*FAQ
*Link Us

Website Bio:
Layout Revision: 04/18/03
Site Creation: -'97
Webmaster: Majin Gohan
Founded By: Ruben Rodas
Site Layout Copyright: Pgd
Live Stats: 6 users online

Site News: The Site is moving along and growing gradually, it may be slow, but we are moving at a good steady pace so this site can regain the calibur it once had. We currently have an excellent staff who is bringing you lots of original information and interaction on the site. We're also constantly working on having media up, and having it stay up for as long as possible / Keep Visitng /

Majin Gohan is literally working all the time for you, the DBGT fans. He works on everything the staff dishes to him plus projects of his own. So make sure you visit DBGT often for his updates.

Donate: Running the site is getting harder and harder because of the server costs, which are well over $100. Since we need a really good server to suit DBGT's needs and to give a pleasant time for you the fans, it could be made easier however through donations. So if you got a couple extra bucks lying around or just want to help us out, please donate to the site using the paypal button above / Thank You All! /
